name: INTERNATIONAL FLAVORS & FRAGRANCES INC
business: International Flavors & Fragrances Inc. (IFF) is a creator and manufacturer of flavors, fragrances, enzymes, cultures, probiotics, soy proteins, and specialty ingredients for food, beverage, health & biosciences, and scent applications. Its products are sold to manufacturers of dairy, meat, beverages, snacks, savory, sweet, baked goods, personal care products, soaps, detergents, cleaning products, perfumes, dietary supplements, food protection, infant, elderly and animal nutrition, functional food, bio-fuel, and oral care products. In 2025, sales were $10.890 billion, with no customer accounting for 10% or more of sales.

exposures.sentence: Our Health & Biosciences segment consists of the development and production of an advanced biotechnology-derived portfolio of enzymes, food cultures, probiotics and specialty ingredients for food and non-food applications.
Animal Nutrition produces feed enzymes and animal health solutions that help to improve nutrition, welfare, performance and sustainability of livestock animal farming.
Grain Processing produces yeasts and enzymes for biofuel production and carbohydrate processing.
We have been increasingly using AI tools in our operations, research and development and other areas.

A significant data breach or other disruption to our information technology systems could disrupt our operations, result in the loss of confidential information or personal data, and adversely impact our reputation, productivity, business or results of operations.

catalysts.event: Divestiture of Pharma Solutions disposal group completed
catalysts.sentence: We completed the divestiture of our Pharma Solutions disposal group, which included certain adjacent businesses, on May 1, 2025
we divested our nitrocellulose business, which was within our Pharma Solutions segment, on May 9, 2025
Effective January 1, 2025, our former Nourish segment was restructured into two newly designated operating segments: Taste and Food Ingredients.
On June 25, 2025, we entered into the Fourth Amended and Restated Credit Agreement
we repurchased $38 million of common stock, as part of the share repurchase program that began on October 1, 2025
We have evaluated and re-prioritized our capital projects and expect that capital spending in 2026 will be approximately 6% of sales.
